mnemonics: CIAs Analyze Design (Continuous Internal Analysis: Internal Evaluations are like CIAs analyzing your algorithm design process.)
keyPoints: Focuses on ongoing assessment during the algorithm course, not just a final exam.
Often includes components like programming assignments, theoretical problem sets, and quizzes.
Meant to evaluate both practical implementation skills and theoretical understanding of algorithm concepts.
commonMistakes: Treating it as a minor assignment rather than a significant portion of the final grade.
Underestimating the time required for the practical coding components of the evaluation.
Focusing only on the theoretical side and neglecting the implementation details required for programming tasks.
